phases.title: Governance Gate
dod: DCP created with 11 decisions, 8 rejected alternatives
Policy updated with forbidden_imports and chart_platform section

phases.title: Foundation — ECharts Migration
dod: CI: security contract tests (XSS payload array)

phases.title: Interaction Layer
dod: Chart-to-grid filtering (click chart → filter AG Grid)
Undo/redo for filter and drill operations
Touch gestures: pinch zoom, swipe navigate
Query cancellation (abort previous on new filter)

phases.title: Enterprise Charts & Themes
dod: RTL: research spike and basic support
Data transforms: moving_avg, percentile, std_dev, regression
Responsive: chart type switch at breakpoint
AG Charts → ECharts full migration complete

phases.title: Grid Abstraction Layer
dod: GridAdapter interface definition (setData, getSelectedRows, onFilterChange, onSortChange, applyExternalFilter, getColumnDefs, destroy)
Grid ↔ Chart deep linking (shared selection state)
Grid filter model → chart filter sync
GridAdapter integration tests with AG Grid

phases.title: AI Integration
dod: Auto-insight: anomaly detection on chart data
Smart chart type suggestion based on data shape
Chart description generation (for a11y alt text)

phases.title: Performance Optimization
dod: Streaming data render (WebSocket/SSE → live chart update)
Cache layer: LRU cache for query results
CDN asset optimization for ECharts modules

phases.title: Collaboration & Offline
dod: Shared annotations on chart data points
Export: PNG, SVG, PDF, CSV, XLSX (combined chart+grid)
Offline: Service Worker for cached dashboard data
Offline: IndexedDB for query result cache
Share link generation with embedded filter state

phases.title: Advanced Analytics & Extensibility
dod: Data storytelling: guided narrative from chart sequence
What-if analysis: parameter sliders → computed projections
Threshold alerts: configurable data alerts with notification
Custom chart plugin API (register new chart types)
Cross-browser compatibility matrix (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
E2E test suite (Playwright, all chart types, all interactions)
Predictive analytics: time series forecasting overlay
Computed fields: derived metrics from multiple data sources
Embeddable mode: chart widget for external sites
API: chart image generation endpoint (server-side ECharts)
Multi-language chart labels from i18n dictionaries
Security audit: OWASP top 10 verification for chart inputs
Documentation: complete developer guide with examples
phases.note: No feature is deferred beyond P8 — this is the complete platform vision.

risks.mitigation: Tree-shaking with echarts/core + modular chart imports. CI gate at 350KB gzip.

risks.description: AG Charts → ECharts migration breaks existing charts
risks.mitigation: Incremental migration. Same props API preserved. AG Charts removed only after all charts migrated.

risks.description: Cross-filter performance with many linked charts
risks.mitigation: Zustand selector-based re-render + debounce + query cancellation.
Client-only boundary ('use client'). No SSR for chart components.

risks.description: WebGL memory leaks on chart destroy/recreate
risks.mitigation: Memory leak CI test (100-cycle mount/unmount). ECharts dispose() on unmount.
Contrast ratio CI gate (4.5:1 minimum). Decal patterns as additional differentiator.

risks.description: Vite prebundle conflict with ECharts dynamic imports
risks.mitigation: optimizeDeps.include for echarts/*, exclude for dynamic chart modules.
sanitizeChartText for all user-provided text. Custom formatter disabled by default.

risks.description: Large dataset (>100K rows) browser tab crash
risks.mitigation: Server-side aggregation threshold + LTTB downsampling + progressive rendering.
ECharts locale registered separately, not pre-bundled in Vite.

risks.description: Design token changes break ECharts theme
risks.mitigation: DesignLabEChartsTheme adapter reads tokens at runtime. Token change → theme auto-updates.

success_metrics.target: <50 lines to add new chart type

timeline_estimate.parallel_opportunities: P4 can start after P2, P5 after P3, P6 concurrent with P4-P5

rollback_strategy.P1: Revert ECharts, restore AG Charts imports. All original files preserved during migration.
rollback_strategy.P2: Remove cross-filter bus. Charts work standalone without filtering.
rollback_strategy.P3: Keep P1 charts, skip enterprise types. No data loss.
rollback_strategy.general: Each phase is independently revertible. No phase depends on unreleased future phases.
